---
title: "A2D2E"
output: html_document
date: "2025-05-28"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## A2D2E main function
```{r} 
library(ALEPlot)
A2D2Plot <- function(D, md, predicted_model, target_variable, K, sp) {
  # Extract the target variable column
  x_j <- D[, target_variable]
  # Define breaks
  breaks <- quantile(x_j, probs = seq(0, 1, length.out = K + 1)) # use quantile to make bins
  breaks[1] <- min(x_j) - 1e-8  # slightly below min
  breaks[K + 1] <- max(x_j)     # exactly at max
  num_seg = 0 # collect the number at each bin
  beta <- NULL  # Collect estimated slopes (betas)

  
  for (k in seq_len(K)) {# for each bin
    # Select points in the k-th segment
    segment_indices <- which(x_j >= breaks[k] & x_j < breaks[k + 1])
    n_k <- length(segment_indices)
    num_seg = c(num_seg, n_k)
    
    beta_k <- c()
    for (i in seq_len(n_k)) {# for each location in the bin
      # Center point
      x_k_i <- D[segment_indices[i], ]
      
        beta_local <- optimal_edge_and_beta_nd(
        model_function = predicted_model,
        md = md,
        target = target_variable,
        center = x_k_i,
        min_window = 1e-12,
        sp = sp
      )
      beta_k <- c(beta_k, beta_local) 
    }
    
    # Average the local slopes
    beta <- c(beta, mean(beta_k))
  }
  
  # Compute accumulated effect
  delta <- breaks[-1] - breaks[-length(breaks)]
  loc <- c(0)
  for (i in 2:(K+1)) {
    loc <- c(loc, loc[i-1] + delta[i-1] * beta[i-1])
  }

  norm_const = as.numeric(num_seg%*%loc/sum(num_seg))
  return(list(
    x.values = as.numeric(breaks),
    f.values = as.numeric(loc-norm_const))) # no center
}
```
 
```{r}
# estimate the beta
cube_beta_target_from_model <- function(center, edge, model_function, md, target) {
  k <- length(center) # dimension of x
  n <- 2^k # total number of vertices
  levels <- lapply(center, function(cj) c(cj - edge, cj + edge))
  X <- expand.grid(levels)
  colnames(X) <- names(center)  # ensure correct column names

  # Evaluate model on each row as named dataframe
  y <- apply(X, 1, function(row) model_function(md, as.data.frame(t(row))))

  z_target <- X[[target]] - center[[target]]
  beta_target <- sum(z_target * y) / (n * edge^2)
  return(beta_target)
}

optimal_edge_and_beta_nd <- function(model_function, md, target, center, 
                                     min_window, threshold = 0.05, sp) {
  k <- length(center)
  n <- 2^k
  spacing <- 0.025

  return(cube_beta_target_from_model(center, sp, model_function, md, target))

  while (spacing > 1e-12) {
    levels <- replicate(k, c(-spacing, spacing), simplify = FALSE)
    cube_points <- expand.grid(levels)
    colnames(cube_points) <- names(center)
    y_vals <- apply(cube_points, 1, function(offset) {
      x <- center + offset
      x_df <- as.data.frame(as.list(as.numeric(x)))
      names(x_df) <- names(center)
      model_function(md, x_df)
      })

    y_center <- model_function(md, center)
    curvature_effect <- y_center - mean(y_vals)
    if (abs(curvature_effect)/y_center < threshold) {
      return(cube_beta_target_from_model(center, spacing, model_function, md, target))
    }

    spacing <- spacing / 10
  }

  # Fallback
  spacing <- 1e-12
  return(cube_beta_target_from_model(center, spacing, model_function, md, target))
}
```

# function for repeat experiment in Section 3
```{r}
library(MASS)
library(nnet)
library(DiceKriging)
library(e1071)
library(randomForest)
library(cubature)
library(gbm3)

main_effect_exp = function(f, md, dep, dim, v, n_train = 200, n_rep = 50, grid_len = 40, sp){
    result_matrix = NULL
for (rep in 1:n_rep) {
  cat("Running bootstrap iteration:", rep, "\n")
  if(dep=="indep")
    X <- matrix(runif(n_train * dim), ncol = dim)
  if(dep == "lowdep"){
    x = runif(n_train)
    X = NULL
    for (j in 1:dim) {
      vi = x+rnorm(n_train,0,0.1)
      X = cbind(X,vi)
    }
  }
  if(dep == "highdep"){
    x = runif(n_train)
    X = NULL
    for (j in 1:dim) {
      vi = x+rnorm(n_train,0,0.01)
      X = cbind(X,vi)
    }
  }
  X <- apply(X, 2, function(col) {(col - min(col)) / (max(col) - min(col))})
  y <- apply(X, 1, f)

    signal_var <- var(y)
  noise_var <- 0.1 * signal_var
  noise_sd  <- sqrt(noise_var)
  noise <- rnorm(length(y), mean = 0, sd = noise_sd)
  y_noisy <- y + noise

  if(md == "GP"){
    model <- km(formula = ~1, design = data.frame(X), response = y, covtype = "matern5_2", nugget.estim = TRUE     )
    yhat <- function(X.model, newdata) {
      pred <- predict(X.model, newdata = data.frame(newdata), type = "UK")
      return(pred$mean)
    }
  }
  
  if(md == "NN"){
    model <- nnet(x = X, y = y, size = 5, linout = TRUE, maxit = 500, trace = FALSE)
    yhat <- function(X.model, newdata) {
      return(predict(X.model, newdata = data.frame(newdata)))
    }
  }
library(nnet)

if (md == "LLM") {
  # Step 1: Fit LLM surrogate
  model_llm <- fit_chatgpt(X, y, model = "gpt-4o-mini", temperature = 0)
  
  # Step 2: Generate synthetic training data from LLM
  d <- ncol(X)  # input dimension
  set.seed(123)
  X_synth <- matrix(runif(100 * d), ncol = d)         # 50 synthetic samples
  y_synth <- predict(model_llm, data.frame(X_synth)) # LLM pseudo-labels
  
  # Step 3: Combine with original training data
  X_train <- rbind(X, X_synth)
  y_train <- c(y, y_synth)
  
  # Step 4: Train NN using nnet (one hidden layer)
  # size = number of hidden units, linout = TRUE for regression
  model <- nnet(
    x = X_train, 
    y = y_train,
    size = 10,       # number of hidden units
    linout = TRUE,   # regression mode
    maxit = 500,     # iterations
    trace = FALSE
  )
  
  # Step 5: Define prediction wrapper
    yhat <- function(X.model, newdata) {
      return(predict(X.model, newdata = data.frame(newdata)))
    }
}

  
  for (target_var in 1:dim) {
    pd_res   <- PDPlot(data.frame(X), model, yhat, J = target_var, K = (grid_len+1))
    ale_res  <- ALEPlot(data.frame(X), model, yhat, J = target_var, K = grid_len)
    a2d2e_res <- A2D2EPlot(data.frame(X), model, yhat, target_var, grid_len, sp)
    
    method_list <- list("1" = pd_res, "2" = ale_res, "3" = a2d2e_res)
    for (method_id in names(method_list)) {
      res <- method_list[[method_id]]
      x_vals <- as.numeric(res$x.values)
      f_vals <- as.numeric(res$f.values)
      row <- c(x_vals, f_vals, as.numeric(method_id), target_var, rep)
      result_matrix <- rbind(result_matrix, row)
    }
  }
}
  # end the experiment
  # compute the ORMSE
  mse_PD = NULL
  mse_ALE = NULL
  mse_A2D2E = NULL

  for (method in 1:3) {
    ormse=NULL
    for (rep in 1:n_rep) {
      ormse_dim = 0
    for (target in 1:dim) {
      idx_method = result_matrix[, (grid_len*2+3)] == method
      idx_tar = result_matrix[, (grid_len*2+4)] == target
      subset_mat <- result_matrix[idx_method & idx_tar, ]
      x_vals <- subset_mat[, 1:(grid_len+1)]
      y_vals <- subset_mat[, (grid_len+2):(grid_len*2+2)]
      m=0
      for (i in 1:ncol(v)) {
      idx = which(x_vals[rep,]>=v[1,i])[1]
      m = m + (v[(target+1),i]-y_vals[rep,idx])^2
      }
      ormse_dim = ormse_dim+sqrt(m/ncol(v)) 
    }
      ormse = c(ormse, ormse_dim/dim)
    }
    if(method==1)
      mse_PD = ormse
    if(method==2)
      mse_ALE = ormse
    if(method==3)
      mse_A2D2E = ormse
  }
return(list(result_mat = result_matrix, ORMSE_PD=mse_PD,ORMSE_ALE=mse_ALE,ORMSE_A2D2E=mse_A2D2E))
} 
```


# plot the results
```{r}
plot_main_effect <- function(mat, truth_mat, x_loc, fix_ylim = TRUE,
                             per_row_in = 3.2,  # height per row (inches)
                             open_new_device = TRUE,
                             title_cex = 1.35) {

  stopifnot(is.matrix(mat))
  p <- ncol(mat)
  method_col <- p - 2
  var_col    <- p - 1

  # infer grid length
  x_count <- (p - 3) / 2
  if (x_count != round(x_count) || x_count < 1) stop("Cannot infer x_count.")
  x_count <- as.integer(x_count)

  # method names
  method_names <- c("1" = "PD", "2" = "ALE", "3" = "A2D2E")

  # keep ALE & A2D2E only
  all_methods <- sort(unique(mat[, method_col]))
  keep <- method_names[as.character(all_methods)] != "PD"
  methods <- all_methods[keep]

  variables <- sort(unique(mat[, var_col]))
  n_row <- length(variables)
  n_col <- length(methods)

  # ---- open a taller device that actually works in RStudio ----
  if (isTRUE(open_new_device)) {
    sz <- try(grDevices::dev.size("in"), silent = TRUE)
    if (inherits(sz, "try-error") || any(!is.finite(sz))) sz <- c(7, 5)
    new_h <- max(per_row_in * n_row, sz[2])
    new_w <- sz[1]
    sys <- Sys.info()[["sysname"]]
    if (identical(sys, "Darwin"))       grDevices::quartz(width = new_w, height = new_h)
    else if (identical(sys, "Windows")) grDevices::windows(width = new_w, height = new_h)
    else                                grDevices::x11(width = new_w, height = new_h)
  }

  # global y-limits
  if (fix_ylim) {
    y_all <- as.numeric(mat[, (x_count + 1):(2 * x_count)])
    ylim_global <- range(y_all, na.rm = TRUE)
    if (!missing(truth_mat)) ylim_global <- range(ylim_global, truth_mat, na.rm = TRUE)
  }

  oldpar <- par(no.readonly = TRUE); on.exit(par(oldpar), add = TRUE)
  par(
    mfrow = c(n_row, n_col),
    mar = c(2.2, 2.2, 2.8, 1.2),   # smaller top margin -> more plotting area
    oma = c(5.5, 7.0, 1.0, 1.0),
    cex.axis = 1.25
  )

  for (ri in seq_along(variables)) {
    v <- variables[ri]
    for (ci in seq_along(methods)) {
      m <- methods[ci]
      sub <- mat[mat[, method_col] == m & mat[, var_col] == v, , drop = FALSE]
      if (nrow(sub) == 0) { plot.new(); next }

      x_all <- as.numeric(sub[1, 1:x_count])

      # y-limits
      ylim_use <- if (fix_ylim) {
        ylim_global
      } else {
        y_min <- +Inf; y_max <- -Inf
        for (i in 1:nrow(sub)) {
          yi <- as.numeric(sub[i, (x_count+1):(2*x_count)])
          y_min <- min(y_min, yi, na.rm = TRUE)
          y_max <- max(y_max, yi, na.rm = TRUE)
        }
        if (!missing(truth_mat)) {
          y_truth <- as.numeric(truth_mat[v + 1, ])
          y_min <- min(y_min, y_truth, na.rm = TRUE)
          y_max <- max(y_max, y_truth, na.rm = TRUE)
        }
        c(y_min, y_max)
      }

      show_xticks <- (ri == n_row)
      show_yticks <- (ci == 1)

      plot(x_all,
           as.numeric(sub[1, (x_count+1):(2*x_count)]),
           type = "l", col = "black", lwd = 2,
           xaxt = "n", yaxt = "n",
           xlab = "", ylab = "",
           xlim = range(x_all, na.rm = TRUE),
           ylim = ylim_use)

      axis(1, labels = show_xticks)
      axis(2, labels = show_yticks)
      abline(h = 0, col = "grey70")

      if (nrow(sub) > 1) {
        for (i in 2:nrow(sub)) {
          lines(x_all, as.numeric(sub[i, (x_count+1):(2*x_count)]), col = "black", lwd = 1)
        }
      }
      if (!missing(truth_mat) && !missing(x_loc)) {
        lines(x_loc, as.numeric(truth_mat[v + 1, ]), col = "red", lwd = 2)
      }
      box()

      # titles: smaller to save vertical space
      nm <- method_names[as.character(m)]
      if (identical(nm, "A2D2E")) {
        title(main = paste("A2D2E , Variable", v), family = "mono", cex.main = title_cex)
      } else {
        title(main = paste(nm, ", Variable", v), cex.main = title_cex)
      }
    }
  }

  mtext("Location", side = 1, outer = TRUE, line = 1, cex = 1.2)
  mtext("Estimated Functional Value", side = 2, outer = TRUE, line = 1, cex = 1.2)
}
```



```{r}
plot_main_effect_separate <- function(
  mat, truth_mat, x_loc, fix_ylim = TRUE,
  out_dir = NULL, file_prefix = "maineffect",
  device = c("png", "pdf"), width = 1200, height = 1200, res = 150
) {
  stopifnot(is.matrix(mat))
  p <- ncol(mat)
  method_col <- p - 2
  var_col    <- p - 1

  # infer grid length
  x_count <- (p - 3) / 2
  if (x_count != round(x_count) || x_count < 1) stop("Cannot infer x_count.")
  x_count <- as.integer(x_count)

  # method names
  method_names <- c("1" = "PD", "2" = "ALE", "3" = "A2D2E")

  methods   <- sort(unique(mat[, method_col]))
  variables <- sort(unique(mat[, var_col]))

  # whether a truth curve is provided
  has_truth <- !missing(truth_mat) && !missing(x_loc)

  # optional: global y-limits across everything
  if (fix_ylim) {
    y_all <- as.numeric(mat[, (x_count + 1):(2 * x_count)])
    ylim_global <- range(y_all, na.rm = TRUE)
    if (has_truth) ylim_global <- range(ylim_global, truth_mat, na.rm = TRUE)
  }

  # file saving?
  save_files <- !is.null(out_dir)
  if (save_files) {
    if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)
    device <- match.arg(device)
  }

  # helper that draws a single panel
  draw_panel <- function(sub, v, m, ylim_use, truth_mat, x_loc, has_truth) {
    x_all <- as.numeric(sub[1, 1:x_count])

    if (!save_files) {
      dev.new(width = 8, height = 6)
    } else {
      mname <- method_names[as.character(m)]
      fname <- sprintf("%s_v%d_%s.%s", file_prefix, v, mname, device)
      fpath <- file.path(out_dir, fname)
      if (device == "png") {
        png(fpath, width = width, height = height, res = res)
      } else {
        pdf(fpath, width = width/150, height = height/150)
      }
    }

    op <- par(no.readonly = TRUE); on.exit(par(op), add = TRUE)
    par(mar = c(4.5, 5.0, 4.0, 2.0), cex.axis = 1.1)
    plot(x_all,
         as.numeric(sub[1, (x_count+1):(2*x_count)]),
         type = "l", col = "black", lwd = 2,
         xlab = "Location", ylab = "Estimated Functional Value",
         xlim = range(x_all, na.rm = TRUE),
         ylim = ylim_use)
    abline(h = 0, col = "grey70")

    if (nrow(sub) > 1) {
      for (i in 2:nrow(sub)) {
        lines(x_all, as.numeric(sub[i, (x_count+1):(2*x_count)]), col = "black", lwd = 1)
      }
    }
    if (has_truth) {
      lines(x_loc, as.numeric(truth_mat[v + 1, ]), col = "red", lwd = 2)
    }

    method_name <- method_names[as.character(m)]
    title(main = sprintf("%s, Variable %d", method_name, v), cex.main = 1.6)
    box()

    if (save_files) dev.off()
    if (save_files) return(fpath) else return(invisible(NULL))
  }

  out_paths <- character(0)

  for (v in variables) {
    for (m in methods) {
      sub <- mat[mat[, method_col] == m & mat[, var_col] == v, , drop = FALSE]
      if (nrow(sub) == 0) next

      # y-limits per figure
      if (fix_ylim) {
        ylim_use <- ylim_global
      } else {
        y_min <- +Inf; y_max <- -Inf
        for (i in 1:nrow(sub)) {
          yi <- as.numeric(sub[i, (x_count+1):(2*x_count)])
          y_min <- min(y_min, yi, na.rm = TRUE)
          y_max <- max(y_max, yi, na.rm = TRUE)
        }
        if (has_truth) {
          y_truth <- as.numeric(truth_mat[v + 1, ])
          y_min <- min(y_min, y_truth, na.rm = TRUE)
          y_max <- max(y_max, y_truth, na.rm = TRUE)
        }
        ylim_use <- c(y_min, y_max)
      }

      res_path <- draw_panel(sub, v, m, ylim_use, truth_mat, x_loc, has_truth)
      if (save_files && !is.null(res_path)) out_paths <- c(out_paths, res_path)
    }
  }

  if (save_files) invisible(out_paths) else invisible(NULL)
}

```


# summarizing results
```{r}
# Compute mean and 95% CI (t-interval) for a numeric vector
mean_ci <- function(x, conf = 0.95, na.rm = TRUE, log_scale = T) {
  x <- if (na.rm) x[!is.na(x)] else x
  n <- length(x)
  stopifnot(n > 1)
  
  if (log_scale) {
    x <- log(x)
  }
  
  m  <- mean(x)
  se <- stats::sd(x) / sqrt(n)
  h  <- stats::qt((1 + conf)/2, df = n - 1) * se
  ci <- c(mean = m, half_width = h, ci_lower = m - h, ci_upper = m + h, n = n)
  
  if (log_scale) {
    # back-transform to original scale
    ci["mean"]       <- exp(ci["mean"])
    ci["half_width"] <- NA  # not directly interpretable after exp
    ci["ci_lower"]   <- exp(ci["ci_lower"])
    ci["ci_upper"]   <- exp(ci["ci_upper"])
  }
  
  return(ci)
}

# Summarize for the three vectors inside your R object
summarize_ci <- function(obj,
                         keys = c("ORMSE_PD", "ORMSE_ALE", "ORMSE_A2D2E"),
                         conf = 0.95,
                         log_scale = T) {
  missing <- setdiff(keys, names(obj))
  if (length(missing)) stop("Missing in object: ", paste(missing, collapse = ", "))
  
  res <- lapply(keys, function(k) {
    vals <- obj[[k]]
    if (!is.numeric(vals)) stop(k, " is not numeric.")
    out <- mean_ci(vals, conf = conf, log_scale = log_scale)
    data.frame(
      Metric = k,
      n = out["n"],
      Mean = out["mean"],
      CI_HalfWidth = out["half_width"],
      CI_Lower = out["ci_lower"],
      CI_Upper = out["ci_upper"],
      row.names = NULL,
      check.names = FALSE
    )
  })
  do.call(rbind, res)
}

```

# example usage
```{r}
# define the branin function and the associated truth
branin <- function(x) {
  # x can be a numeric vector of length 2 or a matrix/data.frame with 2 columns
  if (is.vector(x)) {
    x1 <- x[1]
    x2 <- x[2]
  } else {
    x1 <- x[, 1]
    x2 <- x[, 2]
  }
  
  a <- 1
  b <- 5.1 / (4 * pi^2)
  c <- 5 / pi
  r <- 6
  s <- 10
  t <- 1 / (8 * pi)
  
  (x2 - b * x1^2 + c * x1 - r)^2 + s * (1 - t) * cos(x1) + s
}

truth_brain <- read.table("/vbranin.txt", header = FALSE, sep = "\t")

# experiment 
result = main_effect_exp(f = simple, md = "NN", dep = "lowdep", dim = 2, v = truth_brain, n_train = 250, n_rep = 10, grid_len = 40, sp=0.001)
summarize_ci(result, log_scale = F)

plot_main_effect(result$result_mat,truth_brain,x_loc=truth_brain[1,])
plot_main_effect_separate(result$result_mat, truth_brain, x_loc = truth_brain[1,], fix_ylim = T)
```
